title: Condition vocabulary term
description: A controlled symptom / condition / indication (consumer-facing). vocabularies/conditions.yaml is a list of these. Replaces the WordPress Symptom-tool keys and its free-text synonym map (META.syn). Powers the Symptom-to-Plant Lookup.

id.description: Stable slug, e.g. menstrual-cramps, high-cholesterol, insomnia.

body_system.description: Broad grouping, e.g. cardiovascular, digestive, reproductive, respiratory, nervous, skin, urinary, immune, metabolic, musculoskeletal.

consumer_synonyms.description: Free-text terms a user might search, e.g. ['period pain','dysmenorrhea','cramps'] -> menstrual-cramps.
